line_1: On the crag's naked point the heifer lows,
line_2: And wide below the brightening landscape glows!

line_1: "Unhappy youth! while yon pale crescent lows
line_2: To watch on silent Nature's deep repose,

line_1: Around their home the storm-pinch'd CATTLE lows,
line_2: No nourishment in frozen pastures grows;
